Class ConsumableItem

java.lang.Object
Item_Classes.Item
Item_Classes.ConsumableItem
public class ConsumableItem extends Item
Represents a restorative item type that can be consumed by a player character. Provides functional behavior to restore a character's health points based on a predefined healing constant upon usage.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class Item

    name, price
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected String
    name
    The descriptive name identifying the item.
    protected int
    price
    The basic gold value or purchase cost assigned to the item.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ConsumableItem(String name, float healAmount)
    Constructs a consumable item with a name and a restoration value, defaulting its monetary price handling to the parent class baseline.
    ConsumableItem(String name, int price, float healAmount)
    Constructs a consumable item with a name, store purchase price, and a restorative health value.

  • Constructor Details

    • ConsumableItem

      public ConsumableItem(String name, float healAmount)
      Constructs a consumable item with a name and a restoration value, defaulting its monetary price handling to the parent class baseline.
      Parameters:
      name - the descriptive name of the item
      healAmount - the quantity of health points this item recovers

    • ConsumableItem

      public ConsumableItem(String name, int price, float healAmount)
      Constructs a consumable item with a name, store purchase price, and a restorative health value.
      Parameters:
      name - the descriptive name of the item
      price - the gold buy or sell value of the item
      healAmount - the quantity of health points this item recovers

  • Method Details

    • getHealAmount

      public float getHealAmount()
      Retrieves the configured health restoration value of the consumable item.
      Returns:
      the configured health restoration value

    • setHealAmount

      public void setHealAmount(float healAmount)
      Updates the health restoration value of the consumable item.
      Parameters:
      healAmount - the updated health restoration value to apply

    • use

      public boolean use(PlayableChar player)
      Applies the item's curative property to the targeted player character.
      Overrides:
      use in class Item
      Parameters:
      player - the user-controlled character consuming the item
      Returns:
      true if the healing routine executes successfully, false if processing fails
